title: Thriller Bark’s Zombies Awaken

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: We lost our pirate lunchboxes, too----...

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: With only cheese... we just can't...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Anyway, please listen to the whole story!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: "Shadows" too, right? That makes it three.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Suddenly I've been engaged in fear!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I knew it wasn't you, though.
